subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of God! That which thou didst write was noted, and it was a clear evidence of thy faith and certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق آنچه نگاشتی ملاحظه گردید بر ایمان و ایقان دلیل واضح بود و چون
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement
